# List all messages

To list all messages, you will need to use our Export API and download the data in CSV format. This API is available in v2.5 and above.

[Learn more about Exporting Message Data](/docs/references/2.5/rest-api/exports-content-stats/export-job-model) | [Learn more about the `Preview` API version](https://developers.intercom.com/build-an-integration/docs/update-your-api-version)
